2604.10717.title: Detecting RAG Extraction Attack via Dual-Path Runtime Integrity Game
2604.10717.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems augment large language models with external knowledge, yet introduce a critical security vulnerability: RAG Knowledge Base Leakage, wherein adversarial prompts can induce the model to divulge retrieved proprietary content. Recent studies reveal that such leakage can be executed through adaptive and iterative attack strategies (named RAG extraction attack), while effective countermeasures remain notably lacking. To bridge this gap, we propose CanaryRAG, a runtime defense mechanism inspired by stack canaries in software security. CanaryRAG embeds carefully designed canary tokens into retrieved chunks and reformulates RAG extraction defense as a dual-path runtime integrity game. Leakage is detected in real time whenever either the target or oracle path violates its expected canary behavior, including under adaptive suppression and obfuscation. Extensive evaluations against existing attacks demonstrate that CanaryRAG provides robust defense, achieving substantially lower chunk recovery rates than state-of-the-art baselines while imposing negligible impact on task performance and inference latency. Moreover, as a plug-and-play solution, CanaryRAG can be seamlessly integrated into arbitrary RAG pipelines without requiring retraining or structural modifications, offering a practical and scalable safeguard for proprietary data.
2604.10717.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）系統通過外部知識增強大型語言模型，但引入了一個關鍵的安全漏洞：RAG 知識庫洩漏，其中對抗性提示可以誘使模型洩露檢索到的專有內容。最近的研究顯示，這種洩漏可以通過自適應和迭代攻擊策略（稱為 RAG 提取攻擊）來執行，而有效的對策仍然明顯不足。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了 CanaryRAG，一種受軟體安全中堆棧金絲雀啟發的運行時防禦機制。CanaryRAG 將精心設計的金絲雀標記嵌入檢索到的塊中，並將 RAG 提取防禦重新構建為一種雙路徑運行時完整性遊戲。每當目標或預言路徑違反其預期的金絲雀行為時，洩漏會實時檢測，包括在自適應抑制和模糊化下。對現有攻擊的廣泛評估表明，CanaryRAG 提供了強大的防禦，實現了顯著低於最先進基準的塊恢復率，同時對任務性能和推理延遲的影響微乎其微。此外，作為一種即插即用的解決方案，CanaryRAG 可以無縫集成到任意 RAG 管道中，而無需重新訓練或結構修改，為專有數據提供了一種實用且可擴展的保護措施。
2604.10717.author: Yuanbo Xie et.al.
2604.10717.authors: Yuanbo Xie, Yingjie Zhang, Yulin Li, Shouyou Song, Xiaokun Chen, Zhihan Liu, Liya Su, Tingwen Liu
